scripts.dev: command -v mprocs >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'mprocs not found — install with: cargo install --locked mprocs'; echo '(see README "Running in Development" for details)'; exit 127; } && mprocs --config mprocs.yaml
scripts.design: command -v mprocs >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'mprocs not found — install with: cargo install --locked mprocs'; exit 127; } && cd design && mprocs --config mprocs.yaml
scripts.tauri:dev: command -v cargo-tauri >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'cargo-tauri not found — install once with: cargo install tauri-cli --version ^2 --locked'; exit 127; } && cd src-tauri && cargo tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: command -v cargo-tauri >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'cargo-tauri not found — install once with: cargo install tauri-cli --version ^2 --locked'; exit 127; } && cd src-tauri && cargo tauri build --bundles deb,appimage
